common.tagline: Pass Your Life in the UK Test

dashboardPage.subtitle: Browse categories from the left menu and continue your learning journey.
dashboardPage.startPracticing: Start practicing to see your activity here
dashboardPage.mockTestDescription: Test your knowledge with a full-length practice exam
dashboardPage.leaderboardDescription: See how you rank against other learners

categoriesPage.title: Categories
categoriesPage.subtitle: Choose a category to start practicing
categoriesPage.noCategoriesDescription: Categories will appear here once they are added to your jurisdiction.
categoriesPage.mockTestDescription: Test your knowledge with a full-length practice exam
categoriesPage.leaderboardDescription: See how you rank against other learners

revisionStartPage.title: Start Revision
revisionStartPage.subtitle: Choose a category to begin your revision session.
revisionStartPage.noCategoriesDescription: Categories will appear here once they are added for your jurisdiction.
revisionStartPage.missingLicenceCategory: Choose a licence category from the side menu before starting revision.
revisionStartPage.sessionChoiceDescription: Choose how you want to continue in {category}.
revisionStartPage.completedSessionDescription: You have completed this session for {category}. Start a new session or review your attempts.
revisionStartPage.questionCountDescription: Choose how many questions to practice for {category}.
revisionStartPage.allDoneDescription: You've completed all questions in {category}. Restart to try again.

revisionPracticePage.title: Practice
revisionPracticePage.questionCountSettingsDescription: Change your question count preference for this category. Saving will restart from category selection.

landingPage.heroTitle: Pass Your Life in the UK Test
landingPage.heroSubtitle: Practice with 2,000+ official-style questions, track your progress, and pass your Life in the UK test with confidence
landingPage.featureQuestionsDescription: Comprehensive question bank covering UK history, government, traditions, and daily life
landingPage.featureMockDescription: Simulate the real test with timed mock exams and instant results
landingPage.featureLeaderboardDescription: Compete with others and track your ranking
landingPage.benefitProgressDescription: Monitor your performance and identify topics that need more practice
landingPage.benefitFeedbackDescription: Get immediate explanations and tips for every question
landingPage.benefitJurisdictionDescription: Practice in your preferred language with full content translation
landingPage.benefitAdaptiveDescription: Focus on your weak areas with smart recommendations
landingPage.ctaDescription: Join thousands of learners who have passed their Life in the UK test with us
landingPage.featuresHeading: Everything you need to pass first time
landingPage.showcaseDescription: Switch languages instantly across every part of the app — questions, explanations, tips, and more.
landingPage.showcaseCategoriesDescription: Browse organized topic categories with real-time progress tracking and accuracy stats.
landingPage.showcaseQuestionsDescription: Practice with official-style Life in the UK test questions — answer, get instant feedback, and track your progress.
landingPage.showcaseExplanationsDescription: Understand every answer with detailed explanations referencing the official handbook.
landingPage.showcaseTipsDescription: Get expert tips and memory aids to help you learn the key facts fast.
landingPage.footerCopyright: © 2025 Life in the UK Test. All rights reserved.
landingPage.footerDisclaimer: This is an independent practice platform. We are not affiliated with or endorsed by the UK government or Home Office. Questions are based on publicly available material from the Life in the United Kingdom: A Guide for New Residents handbook.

loginPage.subtitle: Sign in to continue your learning journey

registerPage.noJurisdictions: No jurisdictions available for this country
registerPage.langConfirmedAllSet: Additional language selected — you're all set!
registerPage.langConfirmDefault: I confirm I want to proceed with only the default language
registerPage.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
registerPage.selectAtLeastOneLanguage: Please select at least one language
registerPage.langConfirmRequired: Please select an additional language or confirm you want to proceed with only the default language

practicePage.title: Practice Hub
practicePage.subtitle: Choose a practice mode to start learning
practicePage.revisionDescription: Practice questions by category and track your progress
practicePage.mockTestDescription: Take full-length practice tests to prepare for the exam
practicePage.trafficSignsDescription: Learn and memorize all traffic signs and their meanings
practicePage.flagsDescription: Review questions you've flagged for later study
practicePage.guideDescription: Quick reference guide for key Life in the UK facts
practicePage.officialQuestionBank: This product includes official Life in the UK test revision materials.

mockTestStartPage.noConfigDescription: Mock test configuration is not available for your jurisdiction yet. Please contact your administrator.
mockTestStartPage.subtitle: Simulate the real exam experience and track your readiness
mockTestStartPage.licenceCategoryRequiredDesc: Please select a licence category from the sidebar before starting.
mockTestStartPage.instruction1: Questions are uniformly sampled from all categories
mockTestStartPage.instruction3: You need {passMark} correct answers to pass ({passPercentage}%)
mockTestStartPage.instruction4: The test auto-submits when time expires
mockTestStartPage.instruction5: You can submit early if finished
mockTestStartPage.instruction6: Progress is saved if you refresh

mockTestHistoryPage.title: Mock Test History
mockTestHistoryPage.subtitle: Review your past mock test attempts

mockTestTestPage.invalidParams: Invalid test parameters. Please start from the mock test page.
mockTestTestPage.timesUpDesc: Your test time has expired. Submitting your answers now…

pricingPage.subtitle: Select the perfect subscription for your learning journey
pricingPage.noPackages: No packages available for your jurisdiction.
pricingPage.checkBackLater: Please check back later or contact support.
pricingPage.notConfigured: Not configured for online payment. Contact support.
pricingPage.faqCancelAnswer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. Your access will continue until the end of your billing period.
pricingPage.faqPaymentMethods: What payment methods do you accept?
pricingPage.faqPaymentMethodsAnswer: We accept all major credit cards, debit cards, and digital payment methods through our secure payment processor.
pricingPage.faqFreeTrialAnswer: Contact our support team to inquire about trial options for your jurisdiction.
pricingPage.selectJurisdiction: Please select a jurisdiction to view subscription packages.
pricingPage.freeTestsExhaustedMessage: You've used all your free mock tests. Subscribe to continue practicing.

paymentSuccessPage.activationDelayed: Payment processed but subscription activation is taking longer than expected. Please contact support if this persists.
paymentSuccessPage.failedToVerify: Failed to verify subscription. Please contact support.

paymentCancelPage.cancelMessage: You cancelled the payment process. No charges were made to your account.
paymentCancelPage.needHelp: Need help? Contact our support team.

revisionHistoryPage.noCompletedSessions: No completed sessions found for this category.

profilePage.title: Profile
profilePage.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?

subscriptionModal.cancelDesc: We're sorry to see you go. Your subscription will remain active until the end of your current billing period — you won't lose access immediately.
subscriptionModal.cancelNotice: Your access continues until the end of your billing period. No immediate changes.
subscriptionModal.upgradeNotice: Your upgrade is applied immediately. You'll be charged a prorated amount for the remaining days in your current billing period.
subscriptionModal.downgradeNotice: Your downgrade takes effect at the end of your current billing period. You keep all current features until then.
subscriptionModal.cancelSectionDesc: Cancel your subscription at any time. You can choose to cancel at the end of your billing period — you won't lose access immediately.

flagsPage.title: Flagged Questions
flagsPage.subtitle: Review questions you've marked for later

pwa.installDescription: Install or add Life In The UK to your phone for quick access and a native app experience.
pwa.benefit3: Faster and lighter than a native app
pwa.androidManual: Open your browser menu (⋮) and tap "Add to Home Screen" or "Install App".
pwa.alreadyInstalled: Life In The UK is already installed on your device. Open it from your home screen!
